zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith於1334年出生在蘇格蘭斯林史爾度時，她的父親John Graham of Dundaff, 9th Earl of Menteith34歲，母親Mary II, Countess of Menteith40歲。她於大約1354年與Thomas 9th Earl of Mar在蘇格蘭度福利爾結婚。她在英國蘇格蘭被列為countess of monteith。她去世於1380年5月4日在蘇格蘭艾斯爾登東納爾德享年46歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭斯林史爾音賀馬米音賀馬米 普利奧利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith于1334年出生在苏格兰斯林史爾度时，她的父亲John Graham of Dundaff, 9th Earl of Menteith34岁，母亲Mary II, Countess of Menteith40岁。她于大约1354年与Thomas 9th Earl of Mar在苏格兰度福利爾结婚。她在英国苏格兰被列为countess of monteith。她去世于1380年5月4日在苏格兰艾斯爾登東納爾德享年46岁，埋葬在苏格兰斯林史爾音賀馬米音賀馬米 普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: Graham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Grantham in Lincolnshire, recorded in Domesday Book as Graham (as well as Grantham, Grandham, and Granham). See also Grantham .

Irish (especially Ulster): in Ireland Graham is generally the Scottish name, but it has additionally been adopted as an Anglicized form of both Ó Creacháin (see Crehan ) and Ó Gormghaile (see Gormley ).

History: The surname Graham was taken to Scotland at the beginning of the 12th century by the Norman baron William de Graham, holder of the manor of Grantham in Lincolnshire, from whom many if not all modern bearers are probably descended. The chief of Clan Graham is the Duke of Montrose.

variants.name: Greim
meanings: South German: from a short form of a compound personal name beginning with the element grīm ‘mask, helmet’.

variants.name: Grahm
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire and northern England): shortened form of   Graham  .

variants.name: Grantham
meanings: English (Lincolnshire and East Yorkshire): habitational name from Grantham in Lincolnshire, of uncertain origin. The final element is Old English hām ‘homestead’; the first may be Old English grand ‘gravel’ or perhaps a personal name Granta, which probably originated as a byname meaning ‘snarler’. See also Graham .

variants.name: Grahame
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Graham  . — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is as high as 261, while the figure for 2010 is supposedly lower than 100.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith was born in 1334, in Doune, Stirlingshire, Scotland, her father, John Graham of Dundaff, 9th Earl of Menteith, was 34 and her mother, Mary II, Countess of Menteith, was 40. She married Thomas 9th Earl of Mar about 1354, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Her occupation is listed as countess of monteith in Scotland, United Kingdom. She died on 4 May 1380, in Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland, at the age of 46, and was buried in Inchmahome Priory, Inchmahome, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith est née en 1334, à Doune, Stirlingshire, Écosse, son père, John Graham of Dundaff, 9th Earl of Menteith, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Mary II, Countess of Menteith, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas 9th Earl of Mar environ 1354, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse. La profession de sa indiquée est countess of monteith à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée le 4 mai 1380, à Dundonald, Ayrshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Inchmahome Priory, Inchmahome, Stirlingshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith 1334 in Doune, Stirlingshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Graham of Dundaff, 9th Earl of Menteith 34 und ihre Mutter Mary II, Countess of Menteith 40. Sie hat um 1354 in Dumfriesshire, Scotland Thomas 9th Earl of Mar geheiratet. ihr Beruf ist als countess of monteith in Schottland, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Sie starb am 4. Mai 1380 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland und wurde in Inchmahome Priory, Inchmahome, Stirlingshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith è nata il nel 1334 nel Doune, Stirlingshire, Scotland, sua padre, John Graham of Dundaff, 9th Earl of Menteith, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Mary II, Countess of Menteith, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Thomas 9th Earl of Mar circa 1354, nel Dumfriesshire, Scotland. La sua occupazione è indicata come countess of monteith nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Morì il 4 maggio 1380, nel Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Inchmahome Priory, Inchmahome, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Graham Countess of Menteithが1334年にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアドウンで生まれた時，父John Graham of Dundaff, 9th Earl of Menteithは34歳，母Mary II, Countess of Menteithは40歳であった。約1354年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアでThomas 9th Earl of Marと結婚した。イギリススコットランドでの職業はcountess of monteithと記録されている。彼女は1380年5月4日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアダンドナルドで46歳で死去し，スコットランドスティルリングシュアイアインチマーhオメインチマーhオメ プリオリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith(이)가 1334년 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 다니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Graham of Dundaff, 9th Earl of Menteith(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary II, Countess of Menteith(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 대략 1354년 스컷랜드 드프리실르에서 Thomas 9th Earl of Mar(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀의 직업은 영국 스코틀랜드에서 countess of monteith이었다. 그녀는 1380년 5월 4일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 던도널드에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 인ch마홈 인ch마홈 프리오리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith nasceu em 1334, em Doune, Stirlingshire, Scotland, seu pai, John Graham of Dundaff, 9th Earl of Menteith, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Mary II, Countess of Menteith, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas 9th Earl of Mar aproximadamente 1354, em Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Sua profissão aparece como countess of monteith em Escócia, United Kingdom. Ela faleceu em 4 de maio de 1380, em Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Inchmahome Priory, Inchmahome, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith родилась в 1334 г. в местности доун, стирлингшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени John Graham of Dundaff, 9th Earl of Menteith было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Mary II, Countess of Menteith, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas 9th Earl of Mar около 1354 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия.  Она работала по профессии countess of monteith в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. Она умерла 4 мая 1380 г. в местности дундональд, аиршир, Шотландия в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности инчмахом приори, инчмахом, стирлингшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith nació en 1334, en Doune, Stirlingshire, Scotland, su papá, John Graham of Dundaff, 9th Earl of Menteith, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Mary II, Countess of Menteith, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Thomas 9th Earl of Mar aproximadamente 1354, en Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Su ocupación registrada era countess of monteith en Escocia, Reino Unido. Murió el 4 de mayo de 1380, en Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en Inchmahome Priory, Inchmahome, Stirlingshire, Scotland.
